title: Friendless
description: A modpack with mods that, if abused, can ruin friendships! Inspired by the modpack The Shulker Archives.
body:
Have friends? Think again! The modpack that allows people to ruin friendships ever since the dawn of time! Sure, you might start with friends, but after just a bit of using (or abusing) this modpack you won't!

(A modpack inspired by The Shulker Archives)

Includes mods such as:
- Essential (for when you still **DO** have friends)
- Sodium (optimization)
- NBT Editor (item making, creative required)
- Itemedit (item making, creative required)
- Simple Item Editor (item making, creative required)
- Autototem (autototem)
- NBT Autocomplete (mostly for NBT Editor, also for commands)
- FZMM (item making, utility, adds cool things to operator tab)
(sorry, cant figure out links. if you want to go to a specific mod please search it in modrinth.)
  
and a LOT more!  
Download to try! (and of course to ruin friendships)  
above is optional ^
